sentences.text_original: 你周末跟朋友见面了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhōu mò gēn péng you jiàn miàn le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari do'sting bilan uchrashdingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты на выходных встречался с другом?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you meet up with a friend over the weekend?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 见了。我们一起去了公园。
sentences.pinyin: Jiàn le. Wǒ men yì qǐ qù le gōng yuán.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Встречался. Мы вместе ходили в парк.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did. We went to the park together.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men zài gōng yuán zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What did you do in the park?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men sàn bù, pāi zhào, liáo tiān.
sentences.text_translation_en: We took a walk, took photos, and chatted.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你跟你朋友认识多久了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ gēn nǐ péng you rèn shi duō jiǔ le?
sentences.text_translation: Do'sting bilan qancha vaqtdan beri tanishsan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как давно ты знаком со своим другом?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long have you known your friend?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 认识三年了。我们是大学同学。
sentences.pinyin: Rèn shi sān nián le. Wǒ men shì dà xué tóng xué.
sentences.text_translation: Uch yildan beri tanishmiz. Biz universitet kursdoshlarimiz.
sentences.text_translation_en: We've known each other for three years. We're university classmates.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men jīng cháng jiàn miàn ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 以前经常见，现在他工作很忙。
sentences.pinyin: Yǐ qián jīng cháng jiàn, xiàn zài tā gōng zuò hěn máng.
sentences.text_translation: Ilgari tez-tez ko'rishardik, hozir u ishda juda band.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Раньше часто виделись, сейчас он очень занят на работе.
sentences.text_translation_en: We used to meet often, but now he's very busy with work.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tā zuò shén me gōng zuò?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Tā shì lǎo shī, jiāo xiǎo xué shēng.
sentences.text_translation: U o'qituvchi, boshlang'ich sinf o'quvchilariga dars beradi.
sentences.text_translation_en: He's a teacher; he teaches primary school students.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men guān xi hǎo ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you two get along well?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo. Tā shì wǒ de hǎo péng you.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi. U mening yaqin do'stim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень хорошие. Он мой хороший друг.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 下次你们见面，可以叫我一起吗？
sentences.pinyin: Xià cì nǐ men jiàn miàn, kě yǐ jiào wǒ yì qǐ ma?
sentences.text_translation: Keyingi safar uchrashganingizda, meni ham chaqirsang bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В следующий раз, когда встретитесь, можешь позвать и меня?
sentences.text_translation_en: Next time you meet up, can you invite me along?
sentences.speaker: A
